title: Galecraft
description: Galecraft is a mod that turns your game into more of a action packed adventure game
body:
[description partially updated for 3.0.0+ and soon for 4.0.0]

Galecraft is a mod that adds many things and features, shall you feel overwhelmed this is here to help but first lets explain this mod.

[i personally recommend using the JEI mod or another like it however due to complex crafting recipes]

Galecraft adds many new armors and weapons and materials in general, here are some armors and weapons!! (and ores) ![a picture showing multiple armors ores and some weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9126e61282a7af1034ba9dc51bdb5646827ae9ca.png)

not a action person? play minecraft for the building and relaxing? this adds new blocks and such too! i built a really simple house using decorite bricks and stone wood, and i used industrial glass for the windows (there was no stone wood door as of the version i made this on but there is now) ![a house built with decorite bricks and stone wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/092304e3ec50f321049802f5b00dd9efaca6d1a8_0.webp)
![a picture of the house containing a red bed, chest, furnace and crafting table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6898d9022a0d6a973736eb1b7d975f6296c27730_0.webp)

perhaps you play minecraft for the adventure and the legendary views, we still have something for you! this mod also adds a new biome in the overworld and some new dimensions (portals are craftable) and about 10-20 structures, even if they dont fit in or something they at least make the area not look empty, heres a temple in the new ancient forest biome, looks really nice! ![a temple in the ancient forest biome surrounded by trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75e4e575b12221dbe1bfb8207cddbdc330376ac4.png)

this mod also adds magic, to use magic you have to have the affinity and spell (craft spells using soul crystal in crafting table)

"i need help how do i play", shall you be in this situation, i have some useful tips for you!

how to obtain a crafting table: either craft it using a complex sequence (look in the recipe book for most things in galecraft) OR find it in a structure, the furnace is the same way. however once you obtain a crafting table theres a much easier and cheaper recipe for both the crafting table and the furnace

how do i regen mana: rightclick with the soul crystal to regen 1 mana a click or sleep and regen it to maximum

my spell wont work: you most likely do not have the affinity, obtain affinities by draining runes

what do i do now?: whatever you want!
